message:
Running command: 
# OpenROAD started. Now find the LibreLane process's pipe to OpenROAD and drain it.
sleep 5

LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID, OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"

# Find the pipe FDs
echo "=== LibreLane pipe FDs ==="
ls -la /proc/$LIBPID/fd/ 2>/dev/null | grep "pipe"

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD pipe FDs ==="
ls -la /proc/$ORPID/fd/ 2>/dev/null | grep "pipe"

function.name: execute_bash
